prose: Fukui reactivity analysis of acrolein (C₃H₄O, 8 atoms) computed at DFT tier 'standard' = B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF RKS), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Partial charges via Mulliken (PySCF). N±1 states: cation (charge +1, mult 2), anion (charge −1, mult 2). Geometry taken as-is from the user-supplied .xyz (no re-optimization at this level). Integrity: trustworthy=true, all checks passed. No warnings reported; f⁺ and f⁻ both sum to exactly 1.0000. Headline value reported is the maximum f⁺ (most electrophilic site): C4 with f⁺ = 0.64232102. The most nucleophilic site is O1 with f⁻ = 0.39388616. These results confirm acrolein's well-known Michael-acceptor character at the β-carbon (C4).
